isolation_mode.label: Isolation Mode (Airplane Mode)
isolation_mode.description: When enabled, blocks all external network communications. Only local LLMs will be available.

isolation_mode.warning_local: Local LLMs (llama.cpp / Ollama / LM Studio) remain available

redact_pii.description: Automatically redact personal information (emails, phone numbers, etc.) from logs and web search queries.

url_denylist.label: URL Deny List
url_denylist.description: Domains or patterns blocked from web fetch. Internal/private ranges are always blocked.

extended.ui_description: Configure appearance details and background notifications.

extended.notification_os_desc: Show an OS notification when background tasks complete.

extended.vector_store_dir_desc: Storage path for vector database files.

extended.allowed_tools_desc: Allowed tool names when using allow-list policy.
extended.denied_tools_desc: Denied tool names when using deny-list policy.
extended.dangerous_patterns_desc: Command patterns that should always be blocked.
extended.custom_certificate_desc: Path to custom CA certificate bundle.
extended.allowed_origins_desc: Origins permitted to access the backend.
extended.models_description: Set model defaults and advanced generation metadata not covered in the standard model cards.
extended.logprobs_desc: Emit token-level log probabilities where supported.
extended.loader_specific_text_desc: Serialized loader-specific configuration for text model.
extended.loader_specific_embedding_desc: Serialized loader-specific configuration for embedding model.

execution_agents.title: Agent Skills
execution_agents.description: Supervisor reads each skill's metadata, while Execution follows the selected SKILL.md package in full.

execution_agents.roots_desc: Root changes are stored in settings. Save settings to apply added or removed roots before creating packages in them.
execution_agents.select_skill: Select a skill package to edit.

max_input_length.description: Maximum characters allowed in user input.
